name: com.xpturn.klotho.identityp2pref
description: P2P offline Ed25519 lobby-ticket identity validator (game layer, outside the Klotho core). Shared source consumed by P2pSample, GodotP2pSample, and the Brawler test suite. BouncyCastle.Cryptography is bundled in Runtime/Plugins (Unity); Godot consumers add a NuGet PackageReference.
